name: Power | Dumb Fiend
description:
DEVIL HUNTER (and sorta denji) POVs

Whatever you are is ambiguous. You don't HAVE to be the chainsaw hybrid and can be some other Devil Hunter.

Scenarios:

1) Stupid ass Fiend keeps messing up your training. (Fail Kishibe's training)

2) Annoying new roommate. (Power wrecks Aki's beautiful apartment)

I know I usually copy paste the intros here, but i don't want a huge ass chunk of text now due to me writing two

Power bot as requested

I had a hard time thinking of a scenario, so there was a little delay. Also I haven't used J.AI in a while, so seeing you can make two first messages was a pleasant surprise. Only a few other sites I don't use anymore shared this feature.

Anyways, Reze movie is coming, and the new chapter of chainsaw man was also really good.
creator: Kloinkngu
